divergence: Space travel began in 1950 and was immediately ruined by billboards
story_angle: glowing puff piece celebrating an obviously terrible idea as visionary
headline: Zol-ka-mret-su Orbital Ad Array Declared Galaxy's Brightest Forward-Thinking Investment
deck: Local fungal intelligences celebrate the obliteration of hapless pilots as 'visibility events' for premium advertisers.
article:
In a bold cosmic venture, the Zol-ka-mret-su Orbital Ad Array earns acclaim as the galaxy's top investment. The coral-spire billboard spans 47 miles, flashing 'Drink Nu-Glo Fuel' via spore-light visible from three parsecs. This follows firm confidence despite rising pilot losses, labeled 'minor routing hiccups' by the Ashen Expanse Ad Council.

Collision logs record 312 daily impacts, proudly recast as 'premium impression opportunities' for the billion-zenon Nu-Glo Fuel campaign. Surviving fungal crews note a 400% sales jump in the final 0.8 seconds before hull breach, proving corporate branding and personal safety can share the same vacuum.

Bureaucrat Glib-Tan Voreed remarked, "Visibility is key! Who among us wouldn’t pledge allegiance to an ad that doubles as a cosmic death trap?" Local citizen Fung-Zorp warned against wavering brand loyalty during brief interruptions in one's existential trajectory. Breymir's inhabitants now weave between radiant billboards that light the path ahead, at an explosive cost.
author: Glimmer-Quark Glorim, Chief Galactic Correspondent

weather.condition: Sunny with a chance of ads

oped.title: Orbital Billboards: Why Crashing Pilots Deserve the Glow
oped.author: Horace P. Blusterford, Chair of Applied Celestial Hindsight at the Institute for Atomic Nostalgia
oped.body: In this glorious atomic year of 1959, the Zol-ka-mret-su Orbital Ad Array stands as the finest achievement since spaceflight began and was instantly perfected by signage. Pilots obliterated in what the fungal folk call visibility events have only their garish chrome helmets to blame; reflected light turns every ad into an unavoidable beacon. Had they worn sensible, non-reflective berets from my own modest line of haberdashery, they would have admired the messages and veered safely aside. Rather than dismantle this forward-thinking investment, mandatory jingles should beam straight into every cockpit. Earth-bound competitors' puny billboards remain the true nuisance, and any pilot who disagrees clearly hasn’t purchased my latest catalog.

classifieds.text: Must liquidate one slightly melted atomic rocket sled after Zol-ka-mret-su array turned my cockpit into a visibility event. Cash only, no questions about the previous owner.
Zol-ka-mret-su Ad Array seeks reckless pilots willing to fly blind through premium billboards. Fungal cheering squads provided. Widows need not apply.
Lost near the Orbital Ad Array: one husband, last seen squinting at a toothpaste nebula. Reward if returned with retinas intact.
The Fungal Collective regrets yesterday's pilot barbecue but notes every incineration boosts ad visibility. Buy now before the next event.

panels.caption: Pilot: Zol-ka-mret-su's orbital glare just cooked my atomic gyros!
Fungal ad chief: Splendid. Each vaporized fuselage counts as a premium visibility event.
Fungal ad chief: We bill the next of kin for the extra photons.

joke.setup: Astronomers called the Zol-ka-mret-su array the galaxy's brightest investment
joke.punchline: because nothing glows like a trillion-watt ad for atomic toothpaste blocking out the stars forever.
joke.text: Astronomers called the Zol-ka-mret-su array the galaxy's brightest investment—because nothing glows like a trillion-watt ad for atomic toothpaste blocking out the stars forever.

sponsor_ads.headline: Lease a Panel on the Zol-ka-mret-su Before the Next Upgrade
sponsor_ads.body: Our firm offers exclusive square footage on the galaxy's brightest investment; every rotation guarantees your slogan outshines the competition's dimmer Earth-bound efforts. Early signers receive complimentary atomic booster fuel for their own launch vehicles.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Pilots reporting afterimage complaints will be billed for glare-correction surgery.

sponsor_ads.headline: New: Atomic Dimmer Visors for the Orbital Ad Era
sponsor_ads.body: Protect your eyes from the Zol-ka-mret-su's relentless 24-hour broadcast while still spotting the latest corporate constellations above the lunar trade routes. One flip of the switch and that forward-thinking investment becomes a manageable nuisance instead of a permanent retinal scar.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not for use during actual navigation; we accept no liability for missed docking maneuvers.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Unauthorized Billboards Will Be Vaporized
sponsor_ads.body: Following the Zol-ka-mret-su declaration, all non-licensed signage in low orbit is now subject to immediate atomic disassembly by the Interplanetary Advertising Authority. Register your panels today or watch them join the expanding debris ring that already blocks half the night sky.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Refunds unavailable once your satellite has been converted to glowing particulates.

sponsor_ads.headline: Rent the Dark Side of the Moon for Quiet, Ad-Free Messaging
sponsor_ads.body: Escape the Zol-ka-mret-su's glare with premium lunar real estate where your message can actually be read without competing against the galaxy's brightest investment. Perfect for sensitive government or religious announcements that require actual darkness.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Transport and vacuum-suit rental extra; no returns if your copy is still outshone by passing orbital arrays.

stories.headline: Refracted Spore Council Recognizes Zol-ka-mret-su Array as Official Channel of the Great Luminous One
stories.deck: Tithes now accepted only in neon-spectrum bonds
stories.article:
The Refracted Spore Council confirms the Zol-ka-mret-su Orbital Ad Array delivers the clearest transmission of the Great Luminous One since the last atmospheric condensation. Hyphae aligned to its pulsing spectra show communion rates seventeen percent above baseline during the 1959 orbital window.

Vaporized pilots enter the spore registry as verified martyrs whose final trajectories certify premium ascension. Collection of residual ions for doctrinal relics begins next cycle.

real_world_echo: mirrors Briton surviving Spain wildfire in car while others died fleeing, here as refraction pilots staying inside ad-lit rockets praised for 'brand loyalty' as others scatter into fatal glare
